vocab.meaning: đồ dùng mang tính thực dụng cao
vocab.example: In the morning, my bag is predominantly filled with utilitarian items like my heavy laptop and chargers.

vocab.meaning: tối giản hóa/sắp xếp gọn nhẹ đồ đạc
vocab.example: Before heading out for a gala, I make a conscious effort to streamline my belongings to the bare essentials.

vocab.meaning: có khả năng chịu tải cao, bền bỉ (vật dụng công suất lớn)
vocab.example: I carry a heavy-duty backpack during the day to safeguard my professional equipment.

vocab.meaning: một sự tương phản rõ rệt
vocab.example: There is a stark contrast between my bulky morning briefcase and the sleek clutch I use at night.

vocab.meaning: bao quát mọi thứ (cái gì cũng có)
vocab.example: My morning carry-all is all-encompassing, preparing me for any eventuality that might arise during office hours.

vocab.meaning: bị đè nặng bởi/mang vác nặng
vocab.example: I hate being burdened with paperwork in the evening, so I leave my office folders in my locker.
I opt for a compact cardholder in the evening to avoid the bulk of a traditional wallet.

vocab.meaning: đồ dùng lỉnh kỉnh phục vụ công việc
vocab.example: I strip away all the professional paraphernalia like notebooks and pens when I transition into my social life.
During my commute, I like to have various digital tools at my disposal to stay productive.

vocab.meaning: chú trọng vào vẻ ngoài/thẩm mỹ
vocab.example: My evening accessories are purely aesthetic-driven, designed to match my formal attire.
